loc-saltwire-ext.name: Saltwire Audio — exterior
loc-saltwire-ext.summary: A converted row-house studio in the rain.
loc-saltwire-ext.description: Rain sheets off the steps of a narrow brick row-house. A boutique audiobook studio — and tonight, a wake.

hotspots.label: The brass plaque
hotspots.text: SALTWIRE AUDIO, tarnished bright at the edges. The lights are still on upstairs. Someone's working, even now.

hotspots.label: The wet steps
hotspots.text: No forced entry, no struggle out here. Whoever was here belonged here.

loc-booth.name: The vocal booth
loc-booth.description: Foam tiles, a hanging mic, a pop filter. The quietest room you've ever stood in — and the place they found her.

hotspots.label: The reader's chair
hotspots.text: Della — headphones still on, posed as if she drifted off mid-take. No struggle. No mark. Just… stopped.

hotspots.label: The little desk
hotspots.text: An insulin pen, cap off, beside a cold mug of tea.

hotspots.label: The hanging mic
hotspots.text: Squared to the chair, pop filter dead-center. She was mid-chapter when it happened. Professionals don't leave a session like this on purpose.

loc-control-room.name: The control room
loc-control-room.summary: Monitors, a wall of drives, the contract.
loc-control-room.description: Two monitors, a mixing surface, and a wall of labeled hard drives — decades of a voice, catalogued.

hotspots.label: The wall of master drives
hotspots.text: Decades of Della's masters. One folder — 'DELLA — NEW' — was modified this week. Long after she supposedly stopped.

hotspots.label: A flagged contract folder
hotspots.text: Tabbed and flagged to a single clause, as if someone read it again and again.
